issues.title: Deep Multi-Pothole Trench near Subway Crossing
issues.description: A cluster of three deep potholes spans across the middle lane, forcing cars to swerve dangerously into oncoming traffic during rush hours. Already saw two motorcyclists nearly lose control here.
issues.address: Market St & 8th St, San Francisco, CA 94103
issues.summary: Multiple deep potholes on high-traffic lanes posing immediate danger of collisions and vehicle damage.

activityLog.message: Civic Report logged successfully and AI Vision verified.
Assigned to Public Works Division B (Road Repair Unit).
Asphalt patching crew dispatched. Signs placed on road.

comments.text: Verified this morning. It nearly destroyed my left tire. Glad it is finally marked in progress!

issues.title: Main Water Pipe Burst Flooding Back Alleyway
issues.description: Water is gushing out of a subterranean crack behind the brick bakery warehouse, creating a muddy swamp and rotting the nearby wooden pallets.
issues.address: Tehama St & 3rd St, San Francisco, CA 94103
issues.summary: Underground high-pressure pipe rupture causing extensive surface flooding and threat of basement water intrusion.

activityLog.message: Report created and flagged as Critical Water Pipe Anomaly.
Main line shutoff initiated. Emergency trenching team deployed.
Pipe welded and pressure testing completed. Trench backfilled and re-paved.

comments.text: Water is completely shut off now and workers are actively digging. Fast response!
Verified resolved. Great coordination by the Water Authority. Closing ticket officially.

issues.title: Dangerous Hanging Tree Branch over Playground Swing Set
issues.description: A massive oak branch split during last night's wind storm and is now suspended only by a few fibers directly over the children's swings.
issues.summary: Split tree branch in high-risk zone hanging precariously. High threat of falling and causing injury.

activityLog.message: Reported logged. Child hazard tags added automatically.
Assigned to Forestry and Tree Maintenance Division.

issues.title: Illegal Chemical Container Dumping behind Community Garden
issues.description: Several industrial blue barrels with hazard symbols have been dumped at the dead end behind the community organic farm. There is a sweet chemical odor.
issues.address: Noe Valley Community Garden, San Francisco, CA 94114
issues.summary: Unidentified industrial drums suspected of carrying hazardous chemical waste illegally dumped near food-producing community zones.

activityLog.message: Report logged. Toxic environmental threat flag triggered.

issues.title: Urgent Pothole reported near 566 Guerrero St
issues.description: AI Vision analyzed civic issue. Details: An open surface pothole showing structural cracking. Poses hazard for fast-moving vehicles and cyclists.
issues.urgencyLevel: Immediate repair recommended to prevent tire/suspension damage
issues.summary: An open surface pothole showing structural cracking. Poses hazard for fast-moving vehicles and cyclists.

activityLog.message: Civic Report logged successfully and open for verification.

notifications.title: Pothole Crew Dispatched!
notifications.message: Your report "Deep Multi-Pothole Trench near Subway Crossing" is now IN PROGRESS! Road repair unit has been dispatched.

notifications.title: Water Pipe Issue Resolved! 🎉
notifications.message: Excellent work! The pipe burst has been repaired and verified. You earned +30 Citizen Score points!

notifications.title: New High Alert: Garbage Heap
notifications.message: A new report was posted near 566 Guerrero St, San Francisco, CA 94110. Verification needed.
